'''鈭歷-g-ch-f''' ('''kavagchefoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hoik|hoik]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-g-ch-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hoik|hoik]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歷-g-ch-f
|-
! Lemma
| kavagchefoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivagchefoko|thivagchefoko]] || [[word:jivagchefoko|jivagchefoko]] || [[word:shivagchefoko|shivagchefoko]] || [[word:kivagchefoko|kivagchefoko]]
